full_text:
Guo Xun (Xiaoxian) 郭循 (孝先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Xun (郭循), styledXiaoxian (孝先). Defected from Wei but at a banquet, stabbed the drunken Fei Yi. Guo Xun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Shu Kingdom. Guo Xun lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
